Introduction
    Wu Ping-An (Mini Tsai) is the tough-as-nails boss of the powerful Yih Ching Group, a mob organization. Her twin sister is the sweet Wu Ping-Fan (also played by Mini Tsai), who lives a quiet, simple life overseas.
